# Copilot Prompt Templates

Reusable prompt templates for common development tasks, invokable from the Copilot chat.

## Prompts

| Prompt | File | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| **Add API** | `add-api.prompt.md` | Scaffold a new API endpoint with function, use case, and tests |
| **Process Page** | `process-page.prompt.md` | Process a frontend page component with API integration |
